intro: Neurotropis szowitsiana, also known as Russian wormwood or Szovits' wormwood, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Neurotropis szowitsiana include volatile oils, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Neurotropis szowitsiana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into cough syrups and expectorant preparations.
